mapper.sql: select item_id, item_name, category_id, cover_image, model_file, description, history, craft, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, status, del_flag, sort_order, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from heritage_item
mapper.insert:
insert into heritage_item
item_name, category_id, cover_image, model_file, description, history, craft, status, sort_order, remark,
create_by, create_time, update_time,
#{itemName}, #{categoryId}, #{coverImage}, #{modelFile}, #{description}, #{history}, #{craft}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update:
update heritage_item
item_name = #{itemName}, category_id = #{categoryId}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, model_file = #{modelFile}, description = #{description}, history = #{history}, craft = #{craft}, status = #{status}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, remark = #{remark},
update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
where item_id = #{itemId}
update heritage_item set view_count = view_count + 1 where item_id = #{itemId}

update heritage_item
view_count = view_count + 1
like_count = like_count + 1CASE WHEN like_count > 0 THEN like_count - 1 ELSE 0 END
favorite_count = favorite_count + 1CASE WHEN favorite_count > 0 THEN favorite_count - 1 ELSE 0 END
where item_id = #{itemId}
UPDATE heritage_item SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.delete:
delete from heritage_item where item_id in
#{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT i.* FROM heritage_item i LEFT JOIN heritage_user_action a ON i.item_id = a.item_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.action_type = 3 AND i.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT c.category_name as name, COUNT(i.item_id) as value FROM heritage_item i LEFT JOIN heritage_category c ON i.category_id = c.category_id WHERE i.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY c.category_name
SELECT * FROM heritage_item WHERE del_flag = '0' AND model_file IS NOT NULL ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) FROM heritage_item WHERE del_flag = '0'

SELECT '3D数字模型' as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM heritage_item WHERE model_file IS NOT NULL AND del_flag = '0' UNION ALL SELECT '图文资料' as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM heritage_item WHERE model_file IS NULL AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT '点赞总量' as name, SUM(like_count) as value FROM heritage_item WHERE del_flag = '0' UNION ALL SELECT '收藏总量' as name, SUM(favorite_count) as value FROM heritage_item WHERE del_flag = '0' UNION ALL SELECT '评论总量' as name, SUM(comment_count) as value FROM heritage_item WHERE del_flag = '0'
SELECT item_id, item_name, cover_image, create_time FROM heritage_item WHERE del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT item_name as name, view_count as value FROM heritage_item WHERE del_flag = '0' ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT item_name as name, view_count as value FROM heritage_item WHERE del_flag = '0' ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(like_count + favorite_count + comment_count), 0) FROM heritage_item WHERE del_flag = '0'
